text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe seems sluggish compared to her
usual self, and she looks a little unwell, too. I
suggest ending early...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I can't stop now... My friend is still running...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: If she can keep going, then so can I...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I need to close the gap between us... before our
next race... Even if it's just by a little...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'll be fine. I won't overdo it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe could be pushing herself too
hard. I think it's about time to adjust her racing
schedule.
